description: Upload physical architectural floorplans and logically map existing monitoring infrastructure onto them. (1) Create a new Floor View named 'Main-Facility-Floorplan', upload the background image 'main_floorplan.png' from your Desktop, and drag the 'localhost' (or 127.0.0.1) device from the inventory onto the map canvas. (2) Create a second Floor View named 'DR-Facility-Floorplan' and upload 'dr_floorplan.png' from your Desktop as its background. No devices need to be placed on the DR floorplan. Save both views. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
